summary: Oral health education effectively reduces childhood cavity rates through parental guidance, systematic interdisciplinary preventive programs, and behavior change strategies. This approach stands out due to its comprehensive sustainability compared to other interventions focused primarily on physical barriers or single treatments. 教育干预通过父母引导、跨学科系统的预防计划以及行为改变得以有效降低儿童蛀牙率，并因其全面性和持久性而优于侧重于物理障碍或其他单次治疗的方法。 Agent1 concluded that oral health education was the most effective method based on multiple studies showing it reduced cavities by improving behaviors such as better home care habits and dietary choices supported by parent involvement and school-based educational initiatives. Therefore, \(\boxed{\text{oral health education}}\) should be prioritized over more costly or less sustainable alternatives according to current scientific consensus. 这种方法之所以被认为是最优方案是因为它能够从根源上改变不良生活习惯并得到持续的家庭与学校的支持，在经济效率及长期效果上有显著优势。

Therefore, \(\boxed{\text{oral health education}}\) should be prioritized over more costly or less sustainable alternatives according to current scientific consensus. 这种方法之所以被认为是最优方案是因为它能够从根源上改变不良生活习惯并得到持续的家庭与学校的支持，在经济效率及长期效果上有显著优势。. Answer choice: B
